title: BetterVanilla+
description: A vanilla modpack (which doesn't add any more items, blocks etc.) that focuses on optimization and minimalism.
body:
# WARNING
BetterVanilla+ uses a mod called [**Accurate Block Placement Reborn**](https://modrinth.com/mod/accurate-block-placement-reborn), which *can* be **bannable** on some servers. Use the modpack with caution, I am not responsible for if you get banned on a server. If your worried about getting banned, you can always set a keybind under "Accurate Block Placement Reborn", and press it in any server where it is bannable.

# BetterVanilla+
BetterVanilla+ is trying to make a minimalist setup for playing vanilla Minecraft. It has features like torch lighting and other things to make the experience of playing Minecraft, better.

BetterVanilla+ doesn't add cheats. It doesn't include things like fullbright as that's a big advantage for player's just starting out, and instead includes torch lighting.

# Setup
This modpack doesn't configure its self. You'll need to do the following when you get it:
  - Configure [Craftify](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftify) to use your preferred music platform
  - Set your designated chunk limit (I recommend **10-16**)
  - Accept [Essential](https://essential.gg)'s terms of service (if in your version)

After that you should be done.
